Package index

Package Overview

General information about the implemented rules and analysis tools.

mcstRules
Overview of Rules and Analysis Tools for Minimum Cost Spanning Tree Problems

Algorithmic & Decomposition Rules

Rules based on Prim, Kruskal, Boruvka, and cone-wise decomposition.

mcstBird()
Bird's Rule for MCSTP
mcstDuttaKar()
Dutta-Kar's Rule for MCSTP
mcstFolk()
Folk Rule for MCSTP
mcstOWShapley()
Optimistic Weighted Shapley's Rule for MCSTP
mcstPWShapley()
Pessimistic Weighted Shapley's Rule for MCSTP
mcstBoruvka()
Boruvka's Rule for MCSTP
mcstCone()
Cone-wise Decomposition Rules for MCSTP

Cooperative Games

Cost allocations based on the Shapley value or Nucleolus of associated cooperative games.

mcstGamePrivate()
Cost Allocations based on the Private Game for MCSTP
mcstKar()
Kar's Rule for MCSTP
mcstGameIrred()
Cost Allocations based on the Irreducible Game for MCSTP
mcstGameOpt()
Cost Allocations based on the Optimistic Game for MCSTP
mcstGamePublic()
Cost Allocations based on the Public Game for MCSTP
mcstGameCC()
Cost Allocations based on the Cycle-complete Game for MCSTP

Analysis Tools

Tools to evaluate core stability, geometric properties, sensitivity, and compare allocations.

mcstCoreCheck() plot(<mcstp_core>)
Core Stability Check for Cost Allocations
mcstCorePoints() plot(<mcstp_core_point>)
Check Core Emptiness
mcstCorePlot()
Plot the Core Region and Cost Allocations
mcstStabilityRange()
Stability Range for MCST Arcs
mcstSensitivity() plot(<mcstp_sens>)
Sensitivity Analysis for Cost Allocations
mcstCompare() plot(<mcstp_compare>)
Compare Allocation Rules for MCST
